title: Chief Executive Officer
linkedinBio: Marian Brinza este Chief Executive Officer la S.A. CET-Nord, principala companie de producere a energiei termice din nordul Moldovei, cu sediul in Balti.

news_results.snippet: Marian Brinza has been declared the winner of the competition for the position of General Director of SA “CET-Nord”.
news_results.title: Marian Brinza won the competition for the position of director at CET-Nord

companyDescription: CET-Nord este centrala electrica de termoficare din Balti, Moldova. Furnizeaza energie termica si electrica pentru locuitorii orasului Balti si imprejurimi.
